content:

title: Everything You Need to Discover, Watch & Love
Instant Title Discovery
content: Find any movie or series in seconds with Movie fox's real-time global search. Type a title, actor, or genre and watch your results surface instantly — no waiting, no page reloads, just pure discovery at the speed of thought.

title: Category-Led Exploration
content: Navigate the full library through curated genre filters — Action, Drama, Sci-Fi, Horror, Fantasy, Crime, Thriller, and Comedy. Each category reveals a handpicked collection that matches your mood, making the next great watch always just one click away.

title: Your Personal Favorites List
content: Build your own curated collection with the My List feature. Save any title with a single tap and return to it whenever you're ready — your watchlist lives with your session so nothing great ever gets forgotten in the endless scroll.

title: 1–5 Star Rating System
content: Rate every title on a 1-to-5 star scale and shape your own cinematic record. Ratings are displayed alongside IMDb-style scores so you can compare your taste against the crowd — and discover hidden gems that the algorithm might have missed.

title: Hover Preview Reveal
content: Pause on any movie card and watch a rich preview unfold — title, genre tags, IMDb rating, and a plot teaser surface instantly without leaving the browse view. It's the fastest way to decide what's worth your evening without committing to a full title page.

title: Trailer Modal Immersion
content: Launch any official trailer in a full-screen cinematic modal with a dark overlay that blocks out everything else. The experience is designed to feel like a private screening — immersive, focused, and distraction-free from the moment you hit play.

title: Designed Around the Way You Actually Watch
Less Searching, More Watching
content: Smart category filters and instant search across every title in the Movie fox library surface exactly what you're in the mood for — in seconds, not minutes.

title: Keep Favorites in One Premium List
content: Your curated "My List" keeps every saved title in one elegant, personal collection — ready to revisit anytime without losing track of what caught your eye.

title: Poster to Trailer in a Single Elegant Flow
content: One tap on any title launches the trailer instantly — no redirects, no distractions. The shell collector Movie fox experience is seamless from discovery to play.

title: See the Experience Before You Watch
Opening Night, Every Night
content: Full-bleed hero banners surface the biggest titles with cinematic drama and instant-action CTAs.

title: Your Favorites State
content: Save any title instantly. Your curated list is always one tap away.

title: Rate What You Watch
content: IMDb-style 1–5 star ratings surface the best titles in every genre.

title: Instant Context on Hover
content: Every card reveals title, rating, and trailer access on hover.

title: Cinematic on Every Screen
content: Fully responsive from 6-column desktop to 2-column mobile — Movie fox travels with you.

title: How large is the Movie fox library?
content: Movie fox curates a constantly expanding catalogue of over 10,000 titles spanning blockbuster films, critically acclaimed series, and indie gems from around the world. New content is added weekly to ensure you always have something fresh to discover.

title: Does every title include a trailer?
content: Yes — every movie and series on Movie fox features a dedicated trailer button that launches an immersive preview directly on the page. Trailers are sourced and linked for every single item in our database so you can preview before you commit.

title: Which genres does Movie fox cover?
content: Our platform spans eight core categories — Action, Drama, Sci-Fi, Comedy, Horror, Fantasy, Crime, and Thriller — with dedicated filter rails for each. Whether you're hunting for edge-of-seat thrillers or sweeping fantasy epics, our genre system surfaces the right content instantly.

title: What is the "My List" favorites feature?
content: My List is your personal watchlist where you can bookmark any title with a single click for quick access later. It persists across sessions so your curated collection of must-watch films and series is always waiting for you when you return.

title: How does the rating system work?
content: Each title displays an IMDb-style score ranging from 7.0 to 9.5, reflecting aggregated critical and audience consensus. You can also apply your own 1–5 star personal rating to any title, helping you track what you loved and shaping smarter recommendations over time.

title: How quickly does support respond?
content: Our support team typically responds within 24 hours on business days, with priority handling for account and streaming issues. For general enquiries about the platform, the contact form on this page is the fastest route to getting a clear, personal answer.

title: Your Next Favorite Film Is Waiting
content: We’d love to hear from you — and while you’re here, don’t let the conversation stop at the contact form. Movie fox has hundreds of handpicked titles ready to stream, from pulse-pounding thrillers to award-winning dramas. View the Library

title: WCAG 2.1 Compliance
content: The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes: Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive Operable: Interface components are operable Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies
